mapper.sql: select a.oa_id,b.sop_id,b.sop_name, b.version,b.type, a.status, a.remark, a.model_id, c.model_name,a.material_id,g.material_name, a.line_id, d.line_name, a.stage_id, e.stage_name, a.process_id ,f.process_name,a.countersign_user,b.pass_word from mes_oa_sop a left join mes_sop b on a.sop_id = b.sop_id left join mes_model c on a.model_id = c.model_id left join mes_line d on a.line_id = d.line_id left join mes_stage e on a.stage_id = e.stage_id left join mes_process f on a.process_id = f.process_id left join mes_material_info g on a.material_id = g.id

SELECT a.oa_id, a.sop_id, b.sop_name, b.version, a.status, a.model_id, c.model_name, a.material_id, h.material_name, a.line_id, d.line_name, a.stage_id, e.stage_name, a.process_id ,f.process_name, a.terminal_id, i.terminal_name, g.remark,g.request_id,g.countersign_user,a.create_time FROM mes_upload_terminal_page a left join mes_sop b on a.sop_id = b.sop_id left join mes_model c on a.model_id = c.model_id left join mes_line d on a.line_id = d.line_id left join mes_stage e on a.stage_id = e.stage_id left join mes_process f on a.process_id = f.process_id left join mes_oa_sop g ON a.oa_id = g.oa_id left join mes_material_info h ON a.material_id = h.id left join mes_terminal i ON a.terminal_id = i.terminal_id
mapper.select: SELECT a.oa_id,a.countersign_user,a.notify_user,a.sop_id FROM mes_oa_sop a where a.oa_id = #{oaId}
mapper.insert:
insert into mes_oa_sop
id, oa_id, request_id, sop_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, model_id, material_id, line_id, stage_id, process_id, countersign_user,
#{id}, #{oaId}, #{requestId}, #{sopId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{modelId}, #{materialId}, #{lineId}, #{stageId}, #{processId}, #{countersignUser},
mapper.update: update mes_oa_sop set status = #{status} where request_id = #{requestId}
update mes_oa_sop set status = #{status} where oa_id = #{oaId}
mapper.delete:
delete from mes_oa_sop where oa_id in
#{oaId}
mapper.select:
SELECT T.* from (SELECT DISTINCT mos.oa_id, mos.request_id, mos.countersign_user, mos.remark, mos.create_by, mos.create_time, su.nick_name as createByName, mos.`status`, IF(mos.`status`= 1,'未处理','已处理') AS operateStatus, ms.sop_name, ms.file_path, ms.version, ms.pass_word, ms.type
FROM mes_oa_sop mos, mes_sop ms, mes_upload_terminal_page mutp,
mes_line ml, mes_stage mst, mes_process mp, sys_user su WHERE mos.sop_id = ms.sop_id AND mutp.sop_id = mos.sop_id
AND mutp.line_id = ml.line_id AND mutp.stage_id = mst.stage_id AND mutp.process_id = mp.process_id AND mos.create_by = su.user_name )T
and T.countersign_user like concat('%', #{countersignUser},'%') and T.status = #{status} and T.sop_name like concat('%', #{sopName},'%') and operateStatus = #{operateStatus} and T.create_by = #{createBy} and T.oa_id like concat('%', #{oaId},'%')

SELECT T.* from (SELECT DISTINCT mos.oa_id, mos.request_id, mos.countersign_user, mos.remark, mos.create_by, mos.create_time, su.nick_name as createByName, mos.`status`, IF(mos.`status`= 1,'未处理','已处理') AS operateStatus, ms.sop_name, ms.file_path, ms.version, ms.pass_word, ms.type,
mutp.line_id, mutp.stage_id, mutp.process_id,
ml.line_name, mst.stage_name, mp.process_name FROM mes_oa_sop mos, mes_sop ms, mes_upload_terminal_page mutp,
mes_line ml, mes_stage mst, mes_process mp, sys_user su WHERE mos.sop_id = ms.sop_id AND mutp.sop_id = mos.sop_id
AND mutp.line_id = ml.line_id AND mutp.stage_id = mst.stage_id AND mutp.process_id = mp.process_id AND mos.create_by = su.user_name )T
T.oa_id = #{oaId} and T.countersign_user like concat('%', #{countersignUser},'%') and T.status = #{status} and T.sop_name like concat('%', #{sopName},'%') and operateStatus = #{operateStatus} and T.create_by = #{createBy}
